# Omaha Mudjacking Pros

> Professional concrete leveling, mudjacking, and foam/polyjacking referral service in Omaha, Nebraska and the greater metro area. Free estimates. Serving Douglas County, Sarpy County, and Council Bluffs, Iowa.

- Name: Omaha Mudjacking Pros

## Services

- Concrete leveling (mudjacking and foam/polyjacking)
- Driveway leveling
- Sidewalk repair and trip-hazard correction
- Patio and pool deck leveling
- Garage floor leveling

## Service Area

Omaha, Bellevue, Papillion, La Vista, Ralston, Millard, Elkhorn, Gretna, Bennington, Chalco, Council Bluffs IA, Carter Lake IA

## How Concrete Leveling Works

1. Free on-site assessment of sunken slabs
2. Drill small access holes through the concrete
3. Pump soil-cement slurry (mudjacking) or expanding polyurethane foam (polyjacking) beneath the slab
4. Raise the slab gradually to proper grade and pitch
5. Patch access holes — most jobs complete in 2–4 hours

## Pricing (Typical Omaha Market)

- Mudjacking: $600–$2,500 for most residential jobs
- Foam/polyjacking: $800–$3,000
- Both methods cost 50–70% less than full concrete replacement

## Common Questions

- How much does concrete leveling cost in Omaha? Most residential mudjacking jobs range $600–$2,500; foam jacking costs slightly more. Both are 50–70% less than replacement.
- Is mudjacking a permanent fix? Yes — long-lasting repairs with typical 5-year warranties when underlying drainage issues are addressed.
- How long does concrete leveling take? Most jobs complete in 2–4 hours. Foam-jacked surfaces can be driven on in 15 minutes.
- Can all concrete be leveled? Slabs that have simply sunk due to soil settlement are excellent candidates. Crumbling or severely broken concrete usually needs replacement.
